case_title: EVANS, MALAIKA VS PATEL,RAMAN BHAI R.

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL,RAMAN BHAI R.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EVANS, MALAIKA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PATEL,RAMAN BHAI R. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO RAMAN BHAI R. PATEL RETURNED TO SENDER
